Controls:
A,S,D - rotate camera Left, Behind,Right

Right Mouse - Grenade (Clear Map)
Space - Advance Dialogue
Lemon Salad Soup takes place in the strange, demonic realm of No-Demon’s Land a barren, post-apocalyptic wasteland ruled with an iron fist by the Authoritative-Autocratic-Diabolical Bossman.
 
You are a lone wanderer who stumbles into his Den during the sacred annual ceremony of 'Light Somad'.
 
Suddenly, a grotesque creature crosses your path, its presence projects terror into your eyes. A disembodied voice speaks through an intercom to draw your weapon and strike it down.
You obey.
 
The Bossman, enraged by your defiance, summons his legions to take you out - once and for all! With only your trusted sidearm, you must carve your way through his minions; eventually facing the Bossman himself.
 
Yet, as the blood spills and the battle rages, something feels wrong. Reality itself seems fragile, fleeting. Could there be something deeper at play?

details.title: Kitchened
details.description:
You wake up on your own balcony. The door is locked. The lights are too bright to see the city beyond the glass.
“You deserve death, but I’ll give you a chance to escape.”
The apartment you once called home has turned against you — every drawer, every cabinet, every familiar object hides a puzzle or a trap. To get out, you’ll need to piece together fragments of a shared past, decipher messages written in reflections, and confront the memories you’ve tried to bury.
Every action brings you closer to the truth — and to whoever locked you in.

Atmospheric first-person psychological horror experienceA single-location escape puzzle set in a deadly apartmentEnvironmental storytelling and voice-over inner monologueSubtle moral ambiguity: who’s the victim, and who’s the monster?

game.short_text: A first person psychological horror experience where you make phone calls and encounter strange events.
game.title: Zeitgeist

details.title: Zeitgeist
details.description:
Let us suffer seven moons
Through the static monsoon
This game was originally made in 7 days for Scream Jam 2025
You wake up in a small underground bunker. The world outside is FUBAR. You had a vision of strange phone numbers in your dreams. You feel compelled to call these numbers. Use the telephone in the lonely booth outside and get closer to an understanding of what happened.


7 valid phone calls3 real life easter eggs + 2 in-game easter eggs10 scripted abnormalities not including the ending
 Some phone calls may require processing via the computer in the bunker


My vision was to make the mundane act of making phone calls feel mysterious. Inspired by the works of David Lynch (God rest his soul).

game.short_text: Medical study on sleep deprivation.
game.title: I Can't Sleep

details.title: I Can't Sleep
details.description:
*The web version above is rather laggy. Download below for the better experience*
:: Introduction ::
You spot an ad for a medical study in your university's journal. "Participants are wanted for a classified project." All they need is someone to spend the nights in a "control room", answer questions, and "complete simple tasks". The catch is - you are not allowed to sleep for the duration of the study - one week. At the end of it all, though, you will be generously compensated. You've pulled a few all-nighters before and confidently assume you can handle it. You decide to participate.
:: Overview ::
A short (~20 minutes) point-and-click horror game about sleep deprivation and, perhaps, something else.
:: Credits ::
Created for SCREAM JAM 2025 by:> Temi - programming, sounds. itch> Janessa - art, design. itch, artstation> Additional sounds (ambient, clock and typewriter SFX) from freesound.org
:: Controls ::
Mouse for looking around and clicking stuff, and a keyboard for typing!P.S. I know the file is way too bulky for a game like this... Godot default export system is not great and results in 90+ MB files even for empty projects. There is a way to lower the size, but it's tricky, and so far I haven't gotten a working .exe out of it. But I'll keep trying!

Project Description
Boo’s Bounty is a 4 player PVP flying party game where you are mischievous ghosts racing to snatch the most gold across chaotic haunted maps. Soar, steal, and sabotage your friends in a whirlwind of spooky competition where only the greediest ghost wins!

How To Play

Blue boosts around the map make you go faster

Space - Move upward
Left ctrl - Move downward
E - Use Powerup
Escape - open pause menu

This game was developed in one week for the 2025 Scream Jam by me as a solo developer. I did all of the game design, UI, and code myself in this week of the jam. I wouldn't have been able to make a game like this without help from my awesome playtesters:

game.short_text: Your own voice becomes your weapon, but also your biggest enemy.
game.title: LABYRINTH LURKER

details.title: LABYRINTH LURKER
details.description:
This game was created in 7 days as part of the 2025 SCREAM Jam. It requires a working microphone!

Please keep in mind: this is NOT the full game. We have some ideas for the game that we weren't able to complete in the submission period. Consider this a demo.I apologize for the lack of a web build, Unity does not natively support microphone detection in web builds! 
Trapped in an endless procedurally generated maze, you must rely on a flashlight powered by your microphone. Throughout the game, you will use your own voice to ensure your flashlight remains bright. However, every sound you make echoes through the halls and draws the Lurker closer.
Your goal is to survive, floor after floor, finding the elevators which bring you deeper into the maze. Each floor raises the difficulty with tighter spaces, longer paths, and a more relentless Lurker. There is no escape, only survival for as long as your voice can hold out.
And remember, the Lurker is always listening...
Thanks for playing <3 (and comment your high score)
Join our Discord for support, updates and future projects! 


Controls:
[WASD] to move
[SHIFT] to sprint
[RIGHT CLICK] to zoom

game.short_text: A haunted Halloween platforming adventure~
game.title: Sugar Ghouls!

details.title: Sugar Ghouls!
details.description:
Another year, another Halloween night Ghostkid is spending frantically searching for the best candy the neighborhood can offer. But this time around, he's finding himself empty-handed! Though his luck may not have run out yet...
Rumors are spreading fast of one particular house having the biggest, tastiest, and rarest full-size candy bar any kid has ever seen- the fabled Ghoul Bar™! Unlucky for Ghostkid, the house is in another dimension... and guarded by droves of sniveling sugar snatchers who want the candy for themselves! Enter the haunted 3D realm of... the SUGAR GHOULS!

Experience fluid control as you take Ghostkid through a huge, hand-crafted 3D level and try to claim the hidden Ghoul Bar!
Run, jump, and stomp across platforms, slime pits, chomping goblins, fire-ball throwing pumpkins, and more.
Original and funky Halloween tracks by BassClefff and DJ Trooz straight outta the 90s!
Stunning retro 3D graphics and effects that will boggle your eyes, ears, and mind.
Full controller support!

From the Developer:Thanks so much for checking out Sugar Ghouls! Making a 3D platformer has been something I've wanted to do for a very long time, and joining Scream Jam was a wonderful motivator for me to cobble together a small spooky prototype using everything I've learned in development so far. Although it's just a demo, I had a lot of fun trying to make something in such a short time, and I hope you enjoy it.

01 – Interfere with the Artist Set and handle the unlocked item once. 02 – In the Sweetie Set’s cookie box, eat the Brain Cookie. 03 – Inside the Gacha Set’s snow globe, agree with the assistant’s words. 04 – After obtaining something from the Secret Base, speak recklessly to the Factory Owner. 05 – Fix your gaze on the Memory Box. 06 – Use the item unlocked after reaching multiple endings. 07 – Do not be satisfied with the answering machine. 08 – Jump into the swimming pool at the Secret Base. 09 – Use the scalpel from the Doctor Play Set to cut open your Pet Rock. 10 – Overeat the Sweetie Set. 11 – During the Demon Summoning, offer the wrong soul. 12 – Fulfill the true ending conditions, but treat the Factory Owner kindly. The teddy bear still holds memories! You sure have time to hesitate. 20 – Operate the Carbon Capture Cookie Maker in the Secret Base Set.

game.short_text: No legs. No lamp. No life.
game.title: Half Left

details.title: Half Left
details.description:
Download the game for best experience
Nightmare after nightmare. Losing your legs isn't the only torture you'll have.

Control

F - TurnOn/TurnOff Flashlight
1/2/3 - Use Gear
X - Unequip
E - Interact
Mouse ScrollWheel - Change Spectrum
Esc/P - Pause
R - Reload or Charge

Description
Half Left is a top-down shooter horror game.
You are a nurse, trapped in the aftermath of a mysterious biological disaster.
Everyone inside the facility has turned into grotesque, invisible creatures—once human, now horrors of flesh and bone.
But fate had more in store for you.
Infected and desperate, you stopped the mutation the only way you could—by cutting off your own legs.
Now, confined to a wheelchair and armed with a strange flashlight, you must navigate the dark, decaying corridors of the complex.
Keep the light on.
Stay quiet.
And remember—sometimes, the things you can’t see are far worse than those you can.
This game breaks the familiar control instincts you’ve always relied on— because this time, you’re not moving on your own two feet… you’re moving on a WHEELCHAIR.


Narrative
The year is 2042, in a universe parallel to our own. Here, interplanetary exploration has led humanity to new horizons—new worlds once thought unreachable. But curiosity about the unknown isn’t always a virtue. Once again, mankind has brought catastrophe upon Earth itself. And we… or rather, the protagonist of this story, are nothing more than a grain of sand swept along by the storm—struggling desperately to cling to life.


Key Features
- MOVEMENT AND SURVIVAL STRATEGY
Partially simulates how a wheelchair moves in reality.
Moving around in a wheelchair requires a bit more dexterity and arm strength. Playing Half Left can build up your arm muscles.
Every push of the wheels must be calculated carefully.

- SPECTRUM FLASHLIGHT
Your flashlight can switch between different spectrums of light—unveiling what the human eye was never meant to see.

Stay sharp. Pay attention to the signs only a trained eye can notice—and switch to the right spectrum before it’s too late.

- GEAR AND WEAPON
For reasons unknown, the weapons you wield in 2042 are relics of a bygone era—crafted and used in the fashion of the old American Wild West.Clunky, heavy, and slow—but every bullet they fire can be trusted to hit when it matters most.Always check your weapon before a fight. In a place like this, that small habit might be the only thing keeping you alive.


About Us & Support
We are Planck Constant Games—a young, passionate team dedicated to the art of game development. Our mission is to bring something strange, captivating, and unforgettable to every player.
 
Half Left is our very first creation, and we sincerely hope you’ll play it with an open and honest mind.
 
If the game is warmly received, turning it into a complete, fully realized experience won’t just be a dream for us—it’ll be our next step forward.

PM/Game Design: Overmind
Producer/Lead Art: Hharry
Artist: HanhNe
Dev: MiracleLambda72 
Created for Scream Jam 2025 by Planck Constant Games

game.title: Dead Wake

details.title: Dead Wake
details.description:
Browser Version Is Significantly Worse Than The Downloadable Version


Please Note: 
The web build is significantly worse than the normal windows build. It lacks many of the post processing effects in the actual game, but retains the core gameplay mechanics.
The browser version does  not use the forward + renderer, making the volumetric fog not render in. 
All screenshots of the game were taken from the downloadable version.
Story
During a fishing trip, your boat's motor stops working, and you are left stranded in the middle of nowhere, though... you're not the only thing in the waters...
Use your trusty fishing rod to dredge up resources which can be used to fix your motor. Be careful, a giant eel will attack you out of nowhere, and the only way to scare it is to use your shotgun, though your ammunition is limited.
Don't worry, you brought a noise detector with you on your fishing trip. This device can be used to detect the monsters movements before it surfaces, giving you more time to react. This device has a limited charge though... but it can be recharged via the boats inbuild charging station.
Will you be able to survive? Or will the eel take another victim?
Controls
W, A, S, D to move
E to interact(grab shotgun, put shotgun back, fix motor, place scanner in charger, etc)
I to view inventory
Right click to use fishing rod
Left click to shoot shotgun and to charge scanner
Space to turn on/off scanner
Esc to unlock mouse cursor
Mouse scroll button to lock cursor
For the best experience, use a mouse, headphones and a decent computer
This game was made for the SCREAM JAM 2025

game.short_text: Fun party game where you can choose to kill your friends!
game.title: Party Crasher: Round Roulette

details.title: Party Crasher: Round Roulette
details.description:
Please download for best experience 💗 

Have a fun Halloween party with your friends! Except you’re Tenmei Sawyer and you’re a paranoid, paranoid man. 
✩ ┊CONTENT WARNINGS ┊✩
This game is not suited for children. Viewer discretion is advised. 
Blood, Gore, Sensitive Topics, Guns, Profanity, Body Horror, Harsh Words, Loud Noises, Flashing Lights, Psychological Aspects
AGE RATING: 16+ 

✩ PLOT ✩
Ever since that fateful camping trip, Tenmei’s felt like his friends have all been acting strange. Fearful that the scary story he told about Blight Stalkers– monsters that mimic their victim– might’ve become reality, Tenmei invites them all to a Halloween party in order to find out once and for all who among them has been replaced by a monster… or if it’s just his paranoia talking. 

✩ GAMEPLAY
Ask your friends a series of questions in order to determine if they’re a monster or not. Take note of their answers and behaviors. Check your notes to see if they match the signs of the monster. Ensure that you ask the right questions so as to avoid making them too uncomfortable. Uncover what each person could possibly be hiding. Then, once you have enough information, decide who the monster(s) could be and pull the trigger to get rid of the threat for good. 
ENDINGS
This game has a total of 6 endings and each character has unlockable dialogue.

✩ DETAILS ✩


Production Time : Oct 9-Oct 16 / 7 days


Programs : Ren'py, FireAlpaca, Capcut, Google Docs, Twine, Bandlab, Reaper, Minecraft


Gameplay Length: ~30 minutes
6 Unlockable CGs 
✩ CREDITS ✩
Created for Scream Jam 2025
A bit of a quick silly little thing between friends to take a shot at it!Thanks everyone for being so fun to work with even in such a short amount of time!

OST by Bush

Handmade graphics!

I really don't know what else to put here, it's a quirky earthbound inspired game psychological horror, c'mon.

game.short_text: A paper plane will always follow the trajectory it was headed.
game.title: Goodbye Page

details.title: Goodbye Page
details.description:
"What are dreams? Can humans truly ascend to a place where they can change who they are?"
Page visits the house of her absent father, who has completely disappeared out of the blue. The landlord mentions that, oddly enough, his belongings were left in packaged boxes, but he himself could not be found.
However, her arrival at the house suggests that there is something even stranger about her father’s disappearance than she had expected. What could her father have been hiding? And how will all of this affect Page?
· · ·
Goodbye Page is a third-person walking simulator where you play as Page, exploring the mysterious environment of her dad's house. With surreal settings and strange oddities throughout, can she uncover what is really happening in the house?
· · ·
Made by coffeecode3d and TheBlueDash for the Scream Jam 2025 (Will be updated after the Jam)
Original music by CatastrophiMusic· · ·
Note: Goodbye Page takes place in the same universe as our upcoming game ./DreamON. Now that the jam is over, we'll be making updates and improvements. Please stay tuned!
Also feel free to join our Discord:  https://discord.gg/nNWJgKcHwE
If you enjoy the game, please consider giving us a rating!
· · ·
Keyboard Controls
  Camera: Mouse | Move: WASD | Jump: Spacebar
   Interact: E | Dialogue: E / Click / Space
Controller Controls
 
  Camera: Right Analog | Move: Left Analog | Jump: A
   Interact / Dialogue: X | Menu: Start
You can adjust sensitivity in the Menu by going to Settings.

game.short_text: All mysteries are meant to be solved... right?
game.title: Ex Libris Mortis

details.title: Ex Libris Mortis
details.description:
Ex Libris Mortis is a short, atmospheric horror experience. 
Set in the abandoned town of Birchwood Hollow, a young journalism student embarks on a quest to get answers. Why is the town deserted? Where did all its inhabitants go? Your research only deepens the mystery... uncovering truths far more disturbing than you ever imagined. 
Features
Atmospheric mystery: The story blends elements of mystery, noir, and psychological horror.
Forced perspective: Whether by fear, curiosity, or determination, you can't leave the library desk until you've completed your investigation.Low-poly aesthetic: Stylized pixel art and low-poly models reminiscent of late 90's survival horror games.
Single play session: Designed to be completed in a single play session.
This game was designed for Scream Jam 2025 and was made in one week.
Credits
Programming: GlimmerDevEnvironment Artist: CannibalBlueStory: Oystahs

details.description:
IF YOU SEE A BLACK SCREEN - Some AMD gpus have trouble with 3d godot 4.5 projects, running with the `--rendering-driver opengl3` flag should help for now.
After signing the contract, you've been shipped out to a remote platform to perform mysterious audio refinement work. Good performance is rewarded, even when you're strander and on your own. Might you uncover what is actually going on there?
Make sure to read the post-it's and manuals :)

*  Real-time audio processing minigame
* Diagetic UI and physics-based items
* Multiple unique audio defects and events
* Dynamic lighting with day/night cycle
* A crunchy PSX-inspired artstyle with satisfying sound design
*  The satisfaction of a job well done.
Controls:
WASDMoveLeft ShiftSprintSpacebarJumpMouseLookLeft Mouse / Right MouseInteract with objects when promptedEscapeLock/Unlock cursor
SFX are largely recorded, or kitbashed from field recordings where not possible
Water shader takes inspiration from gertsner wave simulations by Riko (https://godotshaders.com/shader/gerstner-wave/)
Marker font is 123Marker bty Olivier Mordefroid

details.title: Shattered Pulse
details.description:
In the fractured corridors of an abandoned school, your mind is the real monster. Toggle your hearing aid between Day Mode and Night Mode. Match symbols on tagged keys to unlock doors, piecing together a diary of lost memories. But every shadow hides a jump scare that cuts the sound, leaving only your gasp.
Alarm! Use headphones for the best experience and at medium or high volume so that the game works as intended.
Tips:
In game you must found 4 keys to open 4 doors to find 4 fragments of diary to restore yourself again. Some doors where you can find keys are locked until the required plot fragment of the diary is picked up.Key items can be found by sound guidance in Night Mode. Which can only be picked up in daytime mode (Press Q)
Controls:
WASD - move
Q - switch to Day Mode
E - open or pick up
Tab - Inventory
